hero.title: Turn in-house imaging AI into standard services your people AND your agents can call directly
hero.sub: One portal. People use the web, agents use MCP — same capabilities, private and secure.
what.audience.title: Two audiences
what.audience.desc: Your people use the web; your AI PACS uses MCP — same capabilities.
what.private.title: Private & secure
what.private.desc: AI and data run inside the hospital — data never leaves.
what.mcp.title: MCP standard
what.mcp.desc: Capabilities exposed to agents via the MCP standard.
what.real.title: Real clearances
what.real.desc: Catalog is real FDA 510(k)-cleared AI software.
step.discover.title: Discover
step.activate.title: Activate
step.connect.title: Connect
step.connect.desc: AI PACS calls via MCP, inside your domain
catalog.title: Capability catalog

detail.toolsLead: Callable tools exposed by this service (sample)
detail.resourcesLead: Resources / URIs exposed by this service (sample)
detail.configLead: Add to your MCP client / orchestration
detail.demoNote: Tool names/params are samples (demo); the real schema ships with the service.
detail.configNote: Subscribe first to get UII_API_KEY from the console; keys never ship in the frontend — inject at runtime.
detail.discovery: Registered in the site-level catalog; agents can discover it via:
detail.copyMd: Copy as markdown for your AI
connect.lead: Agents connect here: copy the MCP endpoint and credentials into your AI PACS.
how.title: How it works: Discover → Activate → Connect
how.lead: Same capabilities — people via the portal, agents via MCP. Calls happen inside the hospital domain; data never leaves.
how.s1.title: ① A person discovers & activates
how.s1.desc: Hospital IT browses, evaluates clinical value & FDA clearance, and activates.
how.s2.title: ② Get connection config
how.s2.desc: After activation, get the MCP endpoint and API Key (copyable in the detail machine view).
how.s3.title: ③ Agent connects via MCP
how.s3.desc: In-house AI PACS (LLM+Agent) loads Skill/MCP and connects via the standard protocol.
how.s4.title: ④ Runs inside your domain
how.s4.desc: Capabilities run inside the hospital domain; data stays in-house and is auditable.
copy.label: Copy
